rationale: Testing Data Lake per DRIVERS-829; child ticket for test infrastructure work, no spec behavior described.
Improvement to error messaging for incompatible server version; UX improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Internal BSON decoder refactor adding typeDecoder implementations; implementation detail, no spec behavior change.
Internal BSON decoder refactor to use typeDecoder; implementation detail, no spec behavior change.
Performance optimization: opt-in reflection-free bson.D encoder; internal improvement, no spec rule involved.
Child of DRIVERS-1332; adding OCSP HTTP Host header test, test infrastructure work.
CRUD spec requires validation that replacement docs lack $-prefixed keys and ArrayFilters requires server 3.6+; driver skipped these.
Fixing flaky tests: timing/race conditions in test code, not driver behavior against spec.
Opt-in reflection-free bson.D decoder; performance/internal improvement, no spec behavior change.
SDAM spec requires heartbeats use connectTimeout as socket timeout; driver incorrectly used socketTimeoutMS instead.
Use runOn syntax in CRUD tests per DRIVERS-679; spec test format update, not a driver behavior fix.
Internal conversion missing Name field in WriteConcernError; internal struct mapping bug, no specific spec rule for Name field.
Adding tests for deleteMany/updateMany with retryWrites per DRIVERS-574; test infrastructure work.
Updating spec test format for bulk write commands per DRIVERS-480; test infrastructure format update.
Documentation improvement for update/replace restrictions; doc change only, no behavior fix.
Adding bsoncore Builder types for ergonomics; internal API improvement, no spec behavior involved.
BSON map with int keys unmarshal error; Go-specific type handling issue, no BSON spec rule on int-keyed maps.
BSON interface{} round-trip produces different type; Go-specific behavior, no BSON spec rule violated.
Backport regression: start time not set after refactor; internal implementation bug from backport, not a spec rule violation.
Confusing session example code in docs; documentation fix to clarify API usage, no spec violation.
Context cancellation not respected after dispatch due to Go net.Conn API limitations; implementation design issue, no spec rule violated.
Updating AWS keys in FLE tests per DRIVERS-1365; test credential/infrastructure update.
Transactions spec requires AbortTransaction on context expiry in WithTransaction; driver fails to abort when context expires during callback.
Adding mgo-compat option for JSON tag fallback in struct codec; mgo compatibility feature, not a spec requirement.
Adding helper types for ListCollections and IndexView.List; ergonomic API improvement, no spec behavior change.
Using server error codes instead of messages per DRIVERS-1323; error handling improvement, child ticket not a spec deviation.
Driver must pass $readPreference in commands to mongos; RunCommand omits it, violating server selection/wire protocol spec requirements.
Fixing command monitoring test assertions to stop skipping keys; test infrastructure improvement.
TLS ServerName override bug when user provides custom config; implementation detail, no TLS spec rule involved.
Data race in SDAM heartbeat test; test code race condition, not driver behavior.
ProcessError checks wrong error type; internal error type checking bug, no specific SDAM spec rule names WriteCommandError handling.
Updating change stream tests to correctly express absence of event assertions per DRIVERS-1028; test infrastructure fix.
BulkWrite spec requires WriteError.Index to match position in models slice; driver returns wrong index for unordered operations.
Default 30-minute connection life timeout closes valid connections unnecessarily; implementation policy bug, no CMAP spec rule mandates this behavior.
Adding error label assertions to retryable writes tests per DRIVERS-1354; test infrastructure update.
Specifying error label in retryable writes test per DRIVERS-1356; test infrastructure update.
Retryable writes spec restricts txnNumber to replica sets and sharded clusters; driver adds it for standalone servers causing errors.
Windows-specific syscall exception during SRV lookup; platform crash/bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Security vulnerability in transitive YAML dependency; dependency/CVE update, no spec behavior involved.
Custom codec ignored when Marshal used before UnmarshalWithRegistry; internal registry caching bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
SDAM spec silent on wrong setName in single topology; fix required spec amendment via DRIVERS-980.
CMAP spec requires ConnectionCreatedEvent before ConnectionReadyEvent; driver emitted them in wrong order per DRIVERS-1042.
RunCommand write errors not converted to mongo errors; internal error translation bug, no specific spec rule names this conversion.
BulkWriteResult upserted count wrong for n>100000 due to integer overflow; spec requires accurate counts in bulk write results.
GridFS spec requires using chunkSize from files document; driver incorrectly uses bucket's chunk size for downloads.
Security vulnerability: insecure LoadLibrary without full path in SSPI wrapper; security audit finding, not a spec issue.
FindOne MaxTime option not passed to internal layer due to assignment bug; internal option plumbing bug, no spec rule specifies this path.
Docs incorrectly say BSON null unmarshals to primitive.Null; documentation fix only.
Issue split from DRIVERS-812; adding Azure and GCP keystore support in FLE tests, child of cross-driver coordination ticket.
omitempty not working for Decimal128; Go-specific struct tag handling bug, no BSON spec rule on omitempty behavior.
